description: Semantic WPF UI Fluent Window block.

contentMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of the window body while the outer window may remain wider.

contentPadding.description: Inner spacing around the window body, using WPF Thickness syntax.

height.description: Initial height of the generated Fluent Window in device-independent pixels.

minHeight.description: Minimum resize height of the generated Fluent Window.

minWidth.description: Minimum resize width of the generated Fluent Window.

title.description: Text used as the native window title.

width.description: Initial width of the generated Fluent Window in device-independent pixels.

content.description: Main window body rendered below the optional title bar.

titleBar.description: Optional WPF UI Title Bar rendered in the window's top row.
